hero.eyebrow: AI venture studio · a few bets at a time
hero.headline: Let's build something — together.
hero.sub: AI gets you 70% of the way. I build the brutal last 30% — and ship it. I invest the engineering and infrastructure to get it live — weeks, not years — and stay in as a small-stake partner. Not a dev shop that ghosts.

deal.title: Pitch me your idea
deal.body: I take a few builds at a time, so bring the one that keeps you up at night. No tech background needed.

deal.title: We get it live
deal.body: From rough idea to a real product people use. Weeks, not years — I bring architecture, the hard parts, and the finish line.

deal.title: We share a small stake
deal.body: I invest my build instead of cash. Equity vests with a short trial — either of us can walk early, clean. I only win if you do.

whyMe.heading: The best of AI and business — and a bench behind me.
whyMe.lead: Most ways to build your idea give you one or the other: a coder who can't tell if it's worth building, or a strategist who can't ship a line of it. With me you get both in one partner who's in it with you — and when your idea needs more, I bring in people who are genuinely the best at what they do.

pillars.label: AI that ships
pillars.title: The brutal 30%
pillars.body: Auth, payments, scale, the finish line — the parts Cursor & Lovable can't take you through.

pillars.label: Business brain
pillars.title: Real judgment
pillars.body: A decade taking products & messy ops from idea to shipped. I'll tell you what's worth building.

pillars.label: Skin in the game
pillars.title: A partner, not a bill
pillars.body: A small stake means I'm in your boat. I only win if we build something that lasts.

bench.title: Software architects & engineers
bench.body: Seriously experienced builders for the hard, scale-it-right parts.

bench.title: Schulich business minds
bench.body: Sharp strategy & go-to-market thinking from one of Canada's top business schools.

bench.title: Founders I've built with
bench.body: People who've shipped real things and know the road you're on.

whyMe.commit: 65% of startups die from cofounder fallout. No hype, no ghosting — if your idea won't fly, I'll tell you on the first call. Free.
whyMe.credentials: AI builder · Schulich MBA · PMP · a decade across global enterprise & startups

mirror.heading: You've got the idea. Not the build.
points: A Notion full of ideas and no one technical to build them with.
You think "I could never make that" every time you see a cool app.
You don't want a course or a cofounder hunt — you just want the thing to exist.
mirror.tag: Then let's build it together — first conversation's on me.
